stemHtml: Which option correctly lists the criteria for aeroplanes that must be fitted with Airborne Collision Avoidance System (ACAS) II, according to the EU Regulation on airspace usage requirements? An aeroplane with a Maximum Certificated Take-off Mass…

options.a: up to 5700 kg or authorised to carry more than 9 passengers.
options.b: up to 5000 kg or authorised to carry more than 19 passengers.
options.c: exceeding 5000 kg or authorised to carry up to 9 passengers.
options.d: exceeding 5700 kg or authorised to carry more than 19 passengers.
